attribution.name: NeoForged primers
attribution.includedContent: Compact searchable summaries, content hashes, source paths, headings, and previews.

attribution.name: misode technical changes
attribution.includedContent: Compact searchable summaries, content hashes, source paths, headings, and previews.

entries.title: Minecraft 1.16.2 version-change sources
entries.summary: Authoritative version-change evidence should combine NeoForged primers for loader migration notes with misode technical-changes markdown for vanilla data and resource format changes.

entries.title: misode 1.16.2-pre1 technical changes
entries.summary: worldgen | Custom world generation and dimension settings now use the same folder pattern in data packs as other resources. data/minecraft/<type>/<namespace>/<path>.json -> data/<namespace>/<type>/<path>.json.

metadata.preview: worldgen | Custom world generation and dimension settings now use the same folder pattern in data packs as other resources. data/minecraft/<type>/<namespace>/<path>.json -> data/<namespace>/<type>/<path>.json.

entries.title: misode 1.16.2-pre2 technical changes
entries.summary: command | The /execute in command now respects dimension scaling.

metadata.preview: command | The /execute in command now respects dimension scaling.

entries.title: misode 1.16.2-rc1 technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data and resource pack format has been increased to 6.

metadata.preview: pack breaking obsolete | Data and resource pack format has been increased to 6.

entries.title: misode 20w28a technical changes
entries.summary: options | Added server property rate-limit. The default of 0 means no limit.

metadata.preview:
options | Added server property rate-limit. The default of 0 means no limit.

worldgen | Added biomes, which are stored in the worldgen/biome folder. Custom biomes can be used in custom dimension generators, and in the single biome world types after adding the data pack.

worldgen | Added configured carvers, which are stored in the worldgen/configured_carver folder.

worldgen | Added configured features, which are stored in the worldgen/configured_feature folder.

worldgen structure | Added configured structure features, which are stored in the worldgen/configured_structure_feature folder.

worldgen | Added configured surface builders, which are stored in the worldgen/configured_surface_builder folder.

worldgen | Added processor lists, which are stored in the worldgen/processor_list folder.

worldgen | Added template pools, which are stored in the worldgen/template_pool folder.

entries.title: misode 20w29a technical changes
entries.summary: command | Changed /spawnpoint and /setworldspawn commands to include an optional angle parameter:

metadata.preview:
command | Changed /spawnpoint and /setworldspawn commands to include an optional angle parameter:

* /spawnpoint [targets] [pos] [angle]

* /setworldspawn [pos] [angle]

worldgen | Added noise settings, which are stored in the worldgen/noise_settings folder.

entries.title: misode 20w30a technical changes
entries.summary: tag | Tags can now have optional entries. Instead of a string, they are defined as { "id": "foo", "required": false }.

metadata.preview: tag | Tags can now have optional entries. Instead of a string, they are defined as { "id": "foo", "required": false }.
